title: IC RegFin Legal, TT&A act on RAS Luxury Skincare Series B fundraise
description: RAS Beauty Private Limited has raised $7.5 million (~₹69 crore) from a Series B fundraise led by Dabur Ventures, an investment platform of Dabur India, with participation from existing investor Unilever Ventures.IC RegFin Legal advised RAS Luxury Skincare on this fundraise.TT&A advised Dabur India on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Gautam Saha (Joint Managing Partner), Swati Chauhan (Partner), Kashish Singhal (Senior Associate), and Megha Rana (Associate).This is the
